uplink.description: Status report, shock/tamper alarm (motion detected), low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds status frame; expected normalized data derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.0 low battery, ShockTamperAlarm Alarm). Six current readings and current-alarm bits are vendor diagnostics, not part of the motion model, so they are not surfaced.

uplink.description: Status report, no shock/tamper alarm (no motion), normal battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds status frame; expected normalized data derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 11.0, ShockTamperAlarm NoAlarm).
Synthetic frame padded to status-frame length; reportType byte[3]==0x00 is a version/datecode report (upstream decodes SWver/HWver/Datecode) with no measurement.

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (config response on fPort 23) carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic input mirroring a TTN config-response example; fPort 23 is the config-response channel, not a measurement.
